title: Ça va être ta fête
writer: Norman Krasna, Pierre Montazel, Clarence Weff
actors: Eddie Constantine, Barbara Laage, Stefan Schnabel
plot: FBI agent John Lewis travels in Europe, from Paris to Lisbon, trying to locate a disappeared fellow secret-agent, Mark Lemoine. Soon he has trouble with a violant gang, and is involved with a young French reporter, Michèle Laurent...
